query:
SELECT fullName, email, team, accessType, paymentStatus, referralCode, groupCode, groupRole
FROM sports_day_registrations
WHERE UPPER(referralCode) = 'SD002UDX'
   OR UPPER(groupCode) = 'SD002UDX'
LIMIT 20;
command:
mysql --batch --raw --column-names --default-character-set=utf8mb4 --host gateway04.us-east-1.prod.aws.tidbcloud.com --port 4000 --user 2P9ir9M7b3E7Qkh.47e60b4ce122 --database 6SwZoJcoJNmN362a73ncsK --execute

FROM sports_day_registrations

   OR UPPER(groupCode) = 'SD002UDX'
LIMIT 20;
